entries.warning: Atezolizumab (Tecentriq) — EMA approval for first-line platinum-ineligible urothelial carcinoma was voluntarily withdrawn in September 2021 following the IMVIGOR110 confirmatory trial (no overall survival benefit). Verify current regulatory status before recommending.

Atezolizumab (Tecentriq) — FDA accelerated approval for platinum-ineligible urothelial carcinoma was voluntarily withdrawn in September 2021 (IMVIGOR010 results). Verify current regulatory status before recommending.
Rucaparib (Rubraca) — FDA approval for BRCA-mutated metastatic CRPC was voluntarily withdrawn in October 2022 (sponsor request). Verify current regulatory status before recommending.
